span.t-attf-class: lib-badge-pill #{'badge-success' if borrow.state == 'returned' else 'badge-primary' if borrow.state == 'borrowed' else 'badge-danger'}

span.style: background-color: #1a365d; color: white; padding: 6.4px 16px; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; display: inline-block;

button.class: btn btn-md custom-cancel w-100 rounded-pill mt-4

div.style: height:100%; width:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:var(--vvip-navy); color:white; font-size:2.5rem;

div.class: text-center py-5 bg-white rounded-4 border shadow-sm
div.p: We couldn't find any matches for your current filters.

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-light rounded-pill px-3 fw-bold

h6.class: fw-bold mb-3 text-uppercase small opacity-75 head

div.style: border:1.5px solid var(--L-border); border-radius:var(--L-radius); overflow:hidden; height:80vh; background:var(--L-white); box-shadow:var(--L-shadow);
height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:var(--vvip-navy); color:white;

div.class: text-center py-4 text-muted border rounded-4 bg-white

div.style: height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:var(--vvip-navy); color:white;

div.class: text-center py-5 text-muted border rounded-4 bg-white
div.p: Borrow books to get personalized suggestions.

div.style: height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:var(--vvip-navy); color:white;

div.class: text-center py-4 text-muted border rounded-4 bg-white

div.div: No trending data for the last 30 days.

textarea.name: reason
textarea.placeholder: Why should we add this book to our library?

div.class: text-center py-5 bg-white rounded-4 border shadow-sm
div.p: You haven't made any purchase requests yet.

div.class: text-center py-5 bg-white rounded-4 border shadow-sm
div.p: Please check back later or contact the librarian.

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:1040; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4); backdrop-filter:blur(3px); opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.25s;

display:none; position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(0.92); z-index:1050; background:#ffffff; border-radius:24px; box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); width:90%; max-width:420px; opacity:0; transition:all 0.3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1); font-family:'Lora',Georgia,serif;
width:60px; height:60px; background:var(--vvip-navy); border-radius:18px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:white; margin:0 auto 15px; font-size:1.5rem;

div.p: Please verify your reservation details below.

div.style: margin:20px 30px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #edf2f7; border-radius:15px; padding:15px;
width:32px; height:32px; background:#f1f5f9; border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:var(--vvip-navy);
display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:1040; background:rgba(15,23,42,0.6); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.25s;

display:none; position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(0.92); z-index:1050; background:#ffffff; border-radius:24px; box-shadow:0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); width:90%; max-width:400px; opacity:0; transition:all 0.3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1); font-family:'Lora', Georgia, serif; overflow:hidden;
width:60px; height:60px; margin:0 auto 15px; background:#fee2e2; color:#dc2626; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.8rem;

div.p: This action will release your reserved slot. This cannot be undone.

div.style: margin:0 25px 25px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #edf2f7; border-radius:15px; padding:15px;

button.style: background:#dc2626; color:white; border:none; padding:12px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.2);
background:transparent; color:#64748b; border:none; padding:10px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;
